reviews.comment:
La atención es impecable. El lugar limpio y ordenado. Buena parada en la autopista Córdoba Rosario. Muy Recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
The service is impeccable. The place is clean and tidy. A good stop on the Córdoba-Rosario highway. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNteDlEdkt3EAE

reviews.comment:

An ideal place to stop for breakfast on your trip, good service and very quiet

Friendly staff. You can eat sandwiches and barbecue.

reviews.comment:
Amo este lugar. Un oasis en la ruta a Córdoba

(Translated by Google)
I love this place. An oasis on the road to Córdoba.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtd2ZmYklREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente para descansar, alejado apenas de la autopista para desenchufarse. Hermosa arboleda llena de pájaros de todas especies. Atención personalizada. Agregaría un surtidor más y un empleado - que antes estaba& en la oficina comercial.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent for relaxing, just a short distance from the highway to disconnect. Beautiful grove full of birds of all kinds. Personalized service. I would add one more gas pump and one more employee—who used to be in the sales office.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbnVuYVZREAE

reviews.comment:
Ofrecen los servicios de ACA, pero los baños están en un estado lamentable. Se ve que con la construcción de la autopista Rosario-Cordoba han perdido mucha clientela y no le dan mucha atención a esta estación. Un punto muy flojo para el ACA...

(Translated by Google)
They offer ACA services, but the restrooms are in a deplorable state. It seems that with the construction of the Rosario-Cordoba highway, they've lost a lot of customers and aren't paying much attention to this station. A major drawback for ACA...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtc3VYNEVREAE

reviews.comment:
Viajo cada 2meses sdespues de la pandemia  es la 2da vez q en el baño de mujeres no hay jabon ni toallas de papel y la limpieza no es la de antes lo demas bien una lastima

(Translated by Google)
I travel every two months. Since the pandemic, this is the second time there's been no soap or paper towels in the women's restroom, and the cleanliness isn't what it used to be. Otherwise, it's fine. What a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMG8ySkp3EAE

reviewer.displayName: Ay de mi, si no anuncio el Evangelio. P. Ariel Diaz (Anunciar el Evangelio)

reviews.comment:
Por qué salir de la autopista Rosario - Córdoba para ir a cargar combustible aquí, además de por la buena atención, es simplemwnre para comerse el imperdible sandwich de jamón crudo.

(Translated by Google)
Why leave the Rosario - Córdoba highway to refuel here, besides the good service, is simply to eat the unmissable prosciutto sandwich.
